news.title: Frieren 1.4.2 Released
news.description: Patch release: module manifests grow to schema v2 (authors, documentation, license, minimum panel version) with a front-end minimum-version gate that blocks modules needing a newer panel, optional tab count badges, wireless interface-role fixes on edit, UI-layout compliance fixes, and expanded docs. More info: Release notes

news.title: Frieren 1.4.1 Released
news.description: Patch release: a reusable read-only console any module can embed (operator-themed, ANSI-aware), terminal color-contrast (WCAG) polish, a single-source app version, deep-linkable module tabs, and connectivity-check fixes.

news.title: Firewall Module (Private)
news.description: New private Firewall module that isolates the captive/portal interface from the LAN and enforces redirect policy — the groundwork for captive-portal attacks such as evilportal. Available as a private module. More info: Patreon post

news.title: Frieren 1.4.0 Released
news.description: Biggest update yet: a new Network module (interfaces, DHCP, diagnostics), an init.d service manager, a redesigned UI built on a custom icon font and shared components, deep-linkable tabs, module search and pagination, and a round of API security hardening.

news.title: Frieren 1.3.0 Released
news.description: Module dependency installs rebuilt on background tasks with live logs, a new shared loading component, HTML support in news, an end-to-end test suite, and backend hardening.

news.title: Scan Module (Private)
news.description: The scanning module is now complete and available as a closed beta exclusively for Patreon supporters. More info: Patreon post

news.title: Frieren 1.2.0 Released
news.description: Polish and reliability update: skeleton loaders, toast feedback everywhere, system update from dashboard, cache busting, backend security hardening, and major frontend/backend refactors.

news.title: Frieren 1.1.0 Released
news.description: Major update: new Packages manager, wireless module rewrite, terminal rewrite with theme support and autologin, news feed, refreshed UI, and new developer tools.

news.title: Frieren 1.0.0 Released
news.description: First public release. Dashboard, Hardware diagnostics, Login, Modules manager, Settings, Terminal, and Wireless management.

lastVersion.comment: Manifest schema v2 (authors, documentation, license, minPanelVersion) with a front-end minimum-version gate, optional tab count badges, wireless interface-role fixes on edit, sidebar reorder, and expanded docs.
